title: imagebuildah: use a stable sort for comparing build args
body: When checking if a history entry in a candidate image that represents a RUN instruction matches what we'll do if the image is not a valid cached image, sort the arguments.  This should fix https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1635.

comments.body: An alternative would be replacing the `Args` map with a slice of `struct { Name, Value string }` values, which is what go-dockerclient uses for passing them to a remote builder, but switching to that here would require changes both here and in imagebuilder.

LGTM
Anyway we can add a test for this?
It's not a guaranteed trigger, but this should hit it the error in at least some cases.
